chunks.text: Center for Student Affairs - EECS at Berkeley Center for Student Affairs The EECS Center for Student Affairs (CSA) provides individual academic and administrative assistance to departmental visitors, students (both graduate and undergraduate), facult

students (both graduate and undergraduate), faculty and staff. Meet Our Staff Our goal is to provide friendly, accurate and efficient academic and administrative services to everyone. Our team is here to assist you in your search for admission inform

to assist you in your search for admission information, financial support, research and teaching appointments. We also handle issues related to student diversity, retention and academic success. Please do not hesitate to contact us with any question

se do not hesitate to contact us with any questions you may have about our student programs. Know your rights! It’s important to know your rights if you’re ever approached by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Stay informed and prepared—
